Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x081D "ICUPS-2000-081D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "I.C.U.P.S.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine which sets $72, $73 and $74 to $00, $FA and $00 respectively. This allows the game to be started at $081D instead of the actual start address at $0810. This is because the code at $0810 relies on the state of two bytes in the tape buffer and the last byte on the stack at the end of tape loading to set these instead.
